$schema-comment: Template for `a365 develop-mcp register-external-mcp-server -f <file>`. Copy this file to scripts/agent365-mcp-registration.json and replace ALL <PLACEHOLDER> values. The serverName MUST start with 'ext_' and be at most 20 characters. See docs/AGENT_365_BYO_MCP.md for the full flow.
description: ServiceNow Service Catalog: search items, fill forms, place and manage orders.

tools.name: search_catalog_items
tools.description: Search ServiceNow catalog items using a natural-language query.

tools.name: get_catalog_item_form
tools.description: Get the order form for a selected ServiceNow catalog item.

tools.name: place_order
tools.description: Place a ServiceNow catalog order with the collected form values.

tools.name: list_user_orders
tools.description: Retrieve all current (non-closed) orders for the authenticated user.

tools.name: update_order
tools.description: Update a small allowlist of fields (short_description, description, comments, urgency, priority) on the caller's catalog order.

tools.name: validate_servicenow_config
tools.description: Validate ServiceNow authentication and catalog access end-to-end.
